risks.risk: Real DB scope expansion before owner approval.
risks.mitigation: Scope gate defaults to not approved and blocks driver/package, real DB connection, live DB tests, migration execution, provider SDK apply, and readiness claims.
Secret Manager references only; raw connection strings, private URLs, token-like values, and production data are rejected.

entries.risk: Real Postgres transaction execution remains future work.
entries.mitigation: This PR fixes SQL design, retry classification, migration indexes, and safety tests without DB connection or production apply.
